title: Yannis Tzamouranis
compiled_truth: Yannis Tzamouranis is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-29 to 2001-10-12), Yannis Tzamouranis sent 10 and received 21 emails, totalling 31 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (8), [Joseph Hrgovcic](people/joseph-hrgovcic) (4), [Mark Tawney](people/mark-tawney) (3), [Claudio Ribeiro](people/claudio-ribeiro) (3), [Todd Kimberlain](people/todd-kimberlain) (3).
